achievements.xpDescription: Milestones recognize your activity on Lendoor.

repGain.subtitleKeepGrowing: Every on-time loan builds your reputation.
repGain.subtitleGroupChange: Your track record unlocked a new level.
repGain.pointsDescription: Your reputation keeps climbing with every repay.

market.nextCreditIn: Your next credit will be available in
market.scoreTooltip: Your reputation score. Goes up with every on-time repayment.

cooldown.title: Your credit line is on pause between this loan and the next one.
cooldown.description: We leave a short cooldown between loans. As soon as this period ends, you'll be able to borrow again.

score.description: Every on-time repayment raises your reputation score.

miniAppFunds.description: Loans are credited to your account. To transfer funds to your main account, use "Withdraw". To load balance, use "Add".
miniAppFunds.depositDescription: Load balance to use for your loans.
miniAppFunds.withdrawDescription: Transfer funds to your main account.

pull.title: How much do you need?
pull.subtitle: Your limit grows with every on-time payment. Choose the amount with the slider and continue to see the rates.
pull.amountHelper: Available now based on your credit line.
pull.noCredit: You don't have credit available yet. Repay your current loan or wait for your line to refresh.
pull.termsExplanation: Rates are calculated based on your reputation and Lendoor score. Repayment amounts already include principal and interest.
pull.termsInfoNote: Interest is calculated on the total amount and applied at the end of the selected term. No hidden fees.
pull.rateCalculatedOnRequest: Your rate is calculated when you request a loan

repay.subtitle: Total outstanding balance
repay.fullPaymentNote: This payment cancels the total amount of your current loan.
repay.connectHint: You need to connect your wallet to repay your loan.
repay.noDebt: You don't have any outstanding balance at the moment.
repay.insufficientBalance: You don't have enough USDC to fully repay this loan.
repay.insufficientBalanceWithAmount: You don't have enough USDC to fully repay this loan. We suggest depositing at least {{amount}} USDC.
repay.depositDescription: Load balance to use for your loans.
repay.withdrawDescription: Transfer your available balance to your main account.

errorBoundary.uiBody: This might be a temporary issue. Try reloading the page.

common.connectionError: Couldn't connect. Try again in a few seconds.
common.setupError: Something went wrong setting up your account. Try again.

withdraw.insufficientBalance: You don't have enough balance to withdraw that amount.

deposit.insufficientBalance: You don't have enough balance for this deposit.

headerUsdc.dialogDescription: This is your available balance for loans and transactions.
headerUsdc.explanation:
"Add funds": load balance to use for your loans.
"Withdraw funds": transfer your available balance to your main account.
headerUsdc.depositDescription: Load balance to use for your loans.
headerUsdc.withdrawDescription: Transfer your available balance to your main account.

errors.invalidFormat: Invalid format. Use numbers and , or . as decimal separator.
errors.insufficientWithdrawBalance: You don't have enough balance to withdraw that amount
errors.insufficientWithdrawBalanceDetailed: You can't withdraw more than your available balance ({{balance}} USDC).

lemonFundsDialogs.depositDescription: Enter the amount you want to add to your credit account.
lemonFundsDialogs.withdrawDescription: Enter the amount you want to transfer to your main account.

borrow.title: Confirm loan
borrow.description: Review the details before confirming your loan.

repay.title: Confirm repayment
repay.description: You will repay the full outstanding balance of your active loan.

webGuard.title: Open Lendoor from Lemon Cash
webGuard.description: The web version is disabled. To use Lendoor, open our mini-app inside Lemon Cash.
webGuard.qrHelp: Scan this code with your camera or Lemon Cash to go straight to the mini-app.
webGuard.footerHelp:
If you're on desktop, scan the QR with your phone.
If you're already on your phone with Lemon installed, tap the button to open the mini-app.

tooltip.title: Available to withdraw
tooltip.line1: Amount you can withdraw right now from the market.
tooltip.line2: Subject to real-time reserves and any withdrawal queues.
tooltip.line3: Some tranches (e.g. Junior) may include cooldowns or delays.

tooltip.title: Backing TVV
tooltip.line1: Total verified value backing the Lendoor credit lines.
tooltip.line2: Includes verified on-chain DeFi assets and off-chain bank assets.
tooltip.line3: Represents backing capacity and overall market health.

tooltip.line1: Conversion derived from the ERC-4626 share price (EVault).
tooltip.line2: Shows how many {{quote}} you get for 1 {{base}}.
tooltip.line3: Excludes gas/fees and any redemption rules.

tooltip.title: SR APY — {{tokenLabel}}
tooltip.line3: APY computed from IRM rate or psSeniorRay drift.

tooltip.title: {{token}} balance
tooltip.line1: Amount of {{token}} you currently hold (senior tranche).
tooltip.line2: Lower risk; senior claim on interest repayments from the pool.
tooltip.line4: Real-time liquidity is subject to market reserves and conditions.

market.supplyCapCopy: Supply cap ${{cap}}. Liquidity is withdrawable anytime, subject to pool balance.

info.title: Withdrawal Info
info.body: Real-time liquidity depends on market reserves; some tranches (e.g. jUSDC) may have cooldown periods.

stats.pageSubtitle: Real-time vault data and lending activity.

error.title: Couldn't connect
error.body: This might be a connection issue. Try again in a few seconds.

step1.title: Get in among the first users.
step1.body1: If you continue now, you'll be among the first {{limit}} users and you'll be able to request your first USDC credit line.
step1.body2: We'll send you a code by email and you'll enter it here to activate your account.

email.helperWithExisting: You can use this email or change it.
email.helper: We'll use this email to send you your access code.

step1.title: Get in early
step1.body: If you continue now, you'll reserve your spot for the next batch (up to 250 spots). The sooner you join, the sooner we'll grant you access.

notAvailable.title: Access is not available yet
notAvailable.body: We're still finishing the rollout for new users. Please try again later.

notLoggedIn.title: Connect your wallet
notLoggedIn.body: Connect your wallet to become one of our first users and request your USDC credit line.

onWaitlist.title: Your profile is on the waitlist
onWaitlist.subtitle: Access is enabled in batches. Nothing else to do, the notification will arrive by email.
onWaitlist.notify: The notification will be sent to {{email}}

title.earlyAccess: Check your email and continue here.

body.earlyAccess: Paste the code below to continue.
body.checkSpam: If you can't find it, check your spam or junk folder.

toast.authFailed: We couldn't check your Self verification.
toast.notYetVisible: We don't see your Self verification yet. Please try again in a few seconds.
toast.notConfirmed: Your Self verification isn't confirmed yet. Wait a few seconds and try again.
toast.syncError: Error while syncing your Self verification.

selfFarcaster.title: Verify your identity with Self to continue
selfFarcaster.body1: We use Self to verify your identity in a secure and privacy-preserving way. This step is required to enable your credit profile in Lendoor.
selfFarcaster.body2: Make sure you have the Self app installed and your passport or ID document loaded before starting verification.

workType.title: What do you do for work?
workType.body: This is only to better understand our community. It does not affect your score or your credit line.

step1.title: Verify your phone number
step1.body: We'll send you a one-time code to confirm your number. Choose how you'd like to receive it.

step2.title: Enter the code
step2.body: We sent a code to {{phone}}. Enter it below to continue.
step2.verifiedMessage: Your phone number has been verified.

errors.invalidNumber: Please enter a valid phone number (7–12 digits).

error.noJourney: We couldn't resolve your user state.

hero.title: Uncollateralized credit
hero.subtitle: We turn your digital reputation into credit power. Your score grows with every repayment.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Credit based on your reputation. No collateral. Fully on-chain.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Verify your identity and start with a microloan. Every on-time repayment raises your score, unlocks higher limits, and builds your on-chain credit profile.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose the amount and term (7, 14, or 21 days). No collateral, no paperwork. Receive USDC directly to your wallet.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Lenders deposit USDC into the vault. Loan interest generates real, non-inflationary yield.

home.mission: Your effort exists. Your credit history doesn't. | Every repayment builds your credit on-chain. | A new credit standard has arrived in LATAM.

bottomCta.title: Get started
bottomCta.subtitle: Connect your wallet, verify your identity, and access your first loan in minutes.

borrowers.title: Borrowers
borrowers.body: Access instant credit based on your reputation without traditional collateral requirements.

lenders.title: Lenders
lenders.body: Supply liquidity to earn competitive yields while powering the future of decentralized credit markets.

missingSetup.title: Something went wrong
